visualParser.command.startSession: Visual Parser: Open browser (wait for URL)
visualParser.command.connectRealChrome: Visual Parser: Connect to real Chrome (bypass 403)
visualParser.command.selectAllForPom: Visual Parser: Select all for Page Object
visualParser.command.selectNoneForPom: Visual Parser: Clear Page Object selection
visualParser.command.selectDefaultForPom: Visual Parser: Reset smart selection for Page Object
visualParser.command.saveStorageState: Visual Parser: Login and save storageState
visualParser.config.uiLanguage: UI language (auto = follow VS Code). Requires: Developer: Reload Window
visualParser.config.locale: Browser locale. Requires: restart browser session (Open browser / Rescan)
visualParser.config.autoStartSession: Open browser when the editor starts. Requires: Developer: Reload Window
visualParser.config.defaultBrowser: Browser for scanning. Requires: restart browser session
visualParser.config.useSystemChrome: Use installed Google Chrome (fewer WAF blocks). Requires: restart browser session
visualParser.config.cdpEndpoint: Attach to existing Chrome, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:9222. Requires: restart browser session
visualParser.config.autoGeneratePageObje: Auto-update Page Object after scan and when catalog checkboxes change (applies immediately)
visualParser.description: Auto-scan UI and generate Playwright Page Objects / locators without hovering
